scope_summary: The current BRD is grounded in 37,446 LOC across 103 files from the selected PHP scope. Unless the scope lock explicitly states full-repository coverage, this document should not be interpreted as claiming that every legacy workflow was analyzed.
current_state_summary: Legacy PHP custom_php_mvc application with 212 routes, 90 controllers, 36 templates, 153 extracted SQL statements, and 0 detected background job workflows.
target_state_summary: Deliver a TypeScript-based target architecture with explicit services, route handling, and hardened security/data access behavior.
blocking_decisions: DEC-SESSION-001: Session behavior must be mapped to the target authentication/session model.
DEC-BDD-001 resolution plan: capture golden flows for the onboarding, contractor placement, and portal upload workflows before sprint planning is approved.
DEC-FILEIO-001: Upload and export workflows require target-state storage and validation design.
DEC-DATA-FUNC-001: Reimplement custom MySQL functions recentProfile(), alignRate() before target-state data access is approved.

top_risks.title: Shared Services: 73 SQL statements carry injection-style or unsafe-query signals
top_risks.mitigation: Upload/export surface requires validation and storage hardening. Parameterize queries and preserve domain data contracts before workflow migration.

top_risks.title: Contractor Placement: 33 SQL statements carry injection-style or unsafe-query signals
top_risks.mitigation: Upload/export surface requires validation and storage hardening. Parameterize queries and preserve domain data contracts before workflow migration. SQL risk flags detected: string_concatenation, possible_unparameterized_query. Session-coupled workflow state may hide business invariants. SQL risk flags detected: string_concatenation.

top_risks.mitigation: Upload/export surface requires validation and storage hardening. Parameterize queries and preserve domain data contracts before workflow migration. recommended_phasing: Deliver a TypeScript-based target architecture with explicit services, route handling, and hardened security/data access behavior.
Close blocking decisions and scope-lock assumptions before Build.
Use domain dossiers for sprint planning and module cards for implementation handoff.
